creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bapt
Date: Sat Mar 23 19:18:28 2013
New Revision: 315070
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/315070

Log:
  Use PORTEXAMPLES variable instead of custom EXAMPLES in plist
  
  PR:		ports/175400
  Submitted by:	Po-Chien Lin <linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw>

Modified:
  head/devel/cdk/Makefile
  head/devel/cdk/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/cdk/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/cdk/Makefile	Sat Mar 23 19:15:01 2013	(r315069)
+++ head/devel/cdk/Makefile	Sat Mar 23 19:18:28 2013	(r315070)
@@ -41,13 +41,6 @@ post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|$$(INSTALL_DATA) cdk-config|$(INSTALL_SCRIPT) cdk-config|g' \
 		${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
 
-pre-install:
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MEXAMPLES}
-PLIST_SUB+=	EXAMPLES=""
-.else
-PLIST_SUB+=	EXAMPLES="@comment "
-.endif
-
 post-install:
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MEXAMPLES}
 	${INSTALL} -d ${EXAMPLESDIR}

Modified: head/devel/cdk/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
